creator: jedgar@fxp.org
text:
On Wed, 1 Mar 2000 mk@mk.pp.ru wrote:

> >Synopsis:       Makefile for /usr/ports/net/wget is missing
> >Description:
> Makefile for /usr/ports/net/wget is missing
> >How-To-Repeat:
> Just cvsup a fresh ports collection
> >Fix:

wget was move from ports/net to ports/ftp many months ago.  If you are
using cvsup, make sure that '*default delete' is in you supfile (and there
is no other cruft in that directory)...unused files/directories should go
away.

-----
Chris D. Faulhaber - jedgar@fxp.org - jedgar@FreeBSD.org
